habitat: Humid rainforests in the lowlands of Sri Lanka's Wet Zone
story: An icon of the skies, the Serendib Scops Owl (Otus thilohoffmanni) is a species from the Strigidae family. It thrives in Humid rainforests in the lowlands of Sri Lanka's Wet Zone, where it interacts with its environment in unique ways. With a conservation status of Endangered (EN), the Serendib Scops Owl is a focus for conservationists worldwide. Understanding the needs of the Serendib Scops Owl helps us better comprehend the challenges facing our planet's wildlife. This poster is a celebration of the Serendib Scops Owl, a bird that inspires wonder and highlights the critical importance of conservation efforts.
Every poster is crafted to inspire curiosity about our planet's incredible biodiversity.
